  "society_power": 0.8,
  "state_power": 7.4,
  "society_change": -1.7,
  "state_change": -1.1,

  "reasoning": "Despite initial strengthening of society through labor movements and the MNC, overall civil society remained weak, while state power slightly decreased due to growing resistance."
